case_title: ARTHUR H. SUTTER et al VS. GREGORY RYKEN et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS JUDD S. KESSLER, TRUSTEE; ART SUTTER; JUDITH SUTTER PIFER, TRUSTEE; AND NORTH AMERICAN RESOURCES COROPORATION'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM AWARD OF ARBITRATORS IS DENIED. THE FACTS OF SHIVER ARE DISTINGUISHABLE IN THAT THE PARTIES WERE DIFFERENT AND THE COMPLAINT WAS FOR MALPRACTICE. HERE, THE PARTIES ARE THE SAME AND A COMPARISON OF THE FEE AWARD AND THE FEE ACTION CLEARLY DEMONSTRATE THAT THE SAME FEES ARE INVOLVED. SEE WALKER V. LA CO. METROPOLITAN TRANSPORTATION AUTHORITY (2005) 35 CAL.4TH 15. RESPONDENT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Notice And Hearing On Petition To Confirm Award Of Arbitrators
Off Calendar Oct-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONERS JUDD S. KESSLER, TRUSTEE; ART SUTTER; JUDITH SUTTER PIFER, TRUSTEE; AND NORTH AMERICAN RESOURCES COROPORATION'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM AWARD OF ARBITRATORS.

APPEARANCES: Amy Elizabeth Allemann, Esq. of Quade & Associates, a PLC 858/642-1700 for petitioners & moving parties; Paul E. Gaspari, Esq. of Tobin & Tobin 772-9618 for respondent & opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. THE FACTS OF SHIVER ARE DISTINGUISHABLE IN THAT THE PARTIES WERE DIFFERENT AND THE COMPLAINT WAS FOR MALPRACTICE. HERE, THE PARTIES ARE THE SAME AND A COMPARISON OF THE FEE AWARD AND THE FEE ACTION CLEARLY DEMONSTRATE THAT THE SAME FEES ARE INVOLVED. SEE WALKER V. LA CO. METROPOLITAN TRANSPORTATION AUTHORITY (2005) 35 CAL.4TH 15. Respondent to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice And Hearing On Petition To Confirm Award Of Arbitrators
Off Calendar Sep-24-2010 Continued To Oct-29-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
